books.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
books.summary: A young boy discovers he is a wizard and begins his magical education at Hogwarts.

books.title: The Hobbit
books.summary: Bilbo Baggins joins a dangerous adventure to help dwarves reclaim their lost home.
A man lives under a strict totalitarian regime where freedom and truth are controlled.

books.title: The Little Prince
books.summary: A young prince travels between planets and learns deep lessons about life and love.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.summary: A young girl observes racism and injustice in her small town through her father's trial.

books.title: Pride and Prejudice
books.summary: Elizabeth Bennet navigates love, pride, family pressure and social expectations.

books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.summary: A mysterious millionaire pursues lost love in the glamorous but empty world of the 1920s.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.summary: A shepherd follows his dream and learns about destiny, courage and personal growth.

books.title: The Da Vinci Code
books.summary: A professor follows hidden clues to solve a mystery involving art, religion and secret societies.
